businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de prima del seguro PMI.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify all property data with official documents.
Consult a mortgage broker for personalized rates.

description.short: Calculate monthly private mortgage insurance (PMI) premium for low down payments.

short_i18n.ar: حساب قسط التأمين العقاري الخاص الشهري (PMI) للدفعات المقدمة المنخفضة.
